name: Semedrian Smith, SherrodBrown.com
subject: your next chance to have an impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- If we're going to elect Democrats up-and-down the ticket, in communities all over the state, then we're going to need **all hands on deck.** It's so important that we're not just talking about getting involved before November, but that we're actually doing the work, _together_ : knocking on doors, having tough conversations, and making sure our friends and family members know what's on the line this fall. [**This weekend, we 've got another opportunity to have a big impact: our next Weekend of Action. Join us by finding an event near you.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff8be/4462dc26/6dc6807a/200741aa/1670766283/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e180814b") There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines right now. Access to healthcare, voting rights, dignity and respect for all Americans -- they're all on the ballot. We need leaders like Sherrod, who will fight for the values we care about, and we need people in office at all levels who will do the same. [**Electing Sherrod, and Democrats up-and-down the ticket, starts with getting involved this weekend. Find an event in your area this weekend right now.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff8be/4462dc26/6dc6807a/200741aa/1670766283/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e180814b") Thanks team, Semedrian Semedrian Smith
Deputy Campaign Manager
---

name: Team Martin Heinrich
subject: Gary Johnson is running against Martin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | We'll keep this quick. Gary Johnson is running against Martin, and we need to reach our new budget goal to fund our new campaign plans.

**_[Contribute here to help Martin take on Gary Johnson's national network of Libertarian supporters ->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+here+to+help+Martin+take+on+G&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2")_**

_Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:_

**Breaking News: Libertarian Gary Johnson is running for Senate in New Mexico!**

Gary Johnson is a former New Mexico governor and presidential candidate with backers who could pour millions into his campaign. We need to fight back right now, .

**_[Contribute $3 now to our Rapid Response Fund->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+ask+now+to+our+Rapid+Response&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2")_**

* * *

News just broke that Gary Johnson is officially challenging me for my Senate seat, and this changes _everything_.

Johnson, a former Republican governor of New Mexico and presidential candidate, has a national network of wealthy donors to bankroll his campaign and a super PAC ready to flood the airwaves with ads against me.

**Johnson raised millions of dollars before, and the Libertarian Party is going to make sure he does it again.**
_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2")** Grassroots donors like you helped me get my first television ad on the air, and I'm so grateful for the support you've given to my campaign already. I hate having to ask for your help again, but Gary Johnson's entrance into my Senate race is extremely serious.

**_[My campaign is in action-mode to respond to this latest news, and we need your help. We must raise another $45,000 into our Rapid Response Fund in the next 48 hours to fight back. Please, contribute now so we can take on the Johnson campaign->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+My+campaign+is+in+actionmode+to+respond+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2")_**
**[FIGHT BACK](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+FIGHT+BACK&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2")** This news is the last thing we needed. The Koch brothers are already spending against me, and national Republicans are making major organizing gains -- now, I also have to contend with national Libertarians funding attacks against me. This race has completely changed.

**_[That's why we have to act fast to respond to Johnson's announcement, team. Please help us hit our rapid response goal in the next 48 hours ->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+have+to+act+fast+to+re&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_2_2")_**

Thanks for your support,
Martin

name: Tina Smith
subject: What's next for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Because of the amazing energy of Minnesotans, progressives, and activists like you -- we won!

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a346/c1f7015/6a4e56d7/11418f50/2585567723/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august?refcode=rtw_20180814PM_em") Friends, I want to thank everyone tonight across our great state of Minnesota who voted in today's primary election. From Luverne to Rochester to Duluth to the Twin Cities -- everywhere in Minnesota progressives came out to send the message that we're fired up and ready to keep Minnesota blue in November. I say a lot on the trail that there are no "wave" elections, there's just hard work. Well, your hard work paid off tonight. Because of the amazing energy of Minnesotans, progressives, and activists like you -- we won! But as happy (and tired!) as we all are tonight, we have to look to the general election and what will be one of the important elections in our lifetimes. And we have to talk candidly about the real differences between myself and our Republican opponent Karin Housley. While I am fighting for increased access to healthcare, Karin Housley wants to repeal the Affordable Care Act and force millions of Americans off their health care. As I'm taking on the Trump administration -- for selling out our students, handing out giant tax breaks to corporations and CEOs, and separating families at the border; Karin Housley is getting applause lines at his rallies and claiming to have a "direct line to the President." Karin Housley would rubber stamp Trump's nominee for the Supreme Court, defund Planned Parenthood, and cater to the special interest gun lobby at every turn. Plain and simple, if we lose, we would hand Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump another vote for every item on their agenda -- and give Democrats very little chance at turning the Senate blue in November. But despite all of this and how high the stakes are, I am still confident. Because I know we can count on this team to do everything -- hit every goal, talk to every voter, and do it all to build a winning campaign. Thank you again for everything you did to get us to this night, and everything you will do over the next 84 days to win this race, take back the Senate for Democrats, and keep Minnesota blue in 2018. Tina | **Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help to hit her August goal if she is going to win this tough race. ** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a346/c1f7015/6a4e56d7/11418f51/2585567723/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august?refcode=rtw_20180814PM_em-biobox&recurring=true")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a346/c1f7015/6a4e56d7/11418f52/2585567723/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

name: Mike Braun
subject: Waiting for Permission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjjdkjjt-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter, If history is any indicator, then there’s no doubt that **Sleepin’ Joe Donnelly will wait until the liberal wing of his party give him permission to support President Trump’s SCOTUS nominee, Judge Kavanaugh.** [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjjdkjjt-kujulhlke-j/) But Hoosiers don’t want their US Senator to merely do the bidding of radical Democrats in the DC Swamp. subject: HUGE news, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCaskill for Missouri
body:
Friend, this can't wait - CNN, _The Washington Post_ AND _POLITICO_ ALL rank Missouri's Senate seat as one of the top toss-ups of 2018. **And the GOP is doing everything it can to replace Claire with a rubber stamp for the worst parts of its agenda.**
GOP special interest groups are already flooding the state with millions of dollars in ads attacking Claire. President Trump even flew to Missouri to headline a huge fundraiser for Josh Hawley, Claire's opponent.
As Claire's finance director, I'm scrambling to get the resources to fight back. **That's why a group of donors has agreed to MATCH ALL DONATIONS received before our deadline tomorrow. But we're still falling short of our $20,000 goal.**
****[We're depending on you to win: Will you give $5 or more right now and have your gift DOUBLED to protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr?refcode=jtk1218-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)****

**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr?refcode=jtk1218-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thanks for having Claire's back.
Erika

name: Mel Hall
subject: If you make a promise, you should keep it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

Honeywell is a major employer here in Indiana's 2nd Congressional District. The company brought in more than $40 billion in global revenue in 2017.

Yet on August 1st, Honeywell stopped funding its retirees' health care, a decision that will devastate over 2,000 retirees in our district who were counting on the retirement benefits they earned.

[**Join me in standing with the workers and retirees of Honeywell. Sign our petition demanding the company**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VdCIQE6lyKTKn36NF6VbkMoi0kgr80-mgBVk6Ek81x0=/aZBCkKLfvZuJcvRsT-Lyq4o_WuuJSASOFET-ICIonWI=)**[keep](https://act.myngp.com/el/VdCIQE6lyKTKn36NF6VbkMoi0kgr80-mgBVk6Ek81x0=/aZBCkKLfvZuJcvRsT-Lyq4o_WuuJSASOFET-ICIonWI=)**[**its promise by fully funding retiree benefits.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VdCIQE6lyKTKn36NF6VbkMoi0kgr80-mgBVk6Ek81x0=/aZBCkKLfvZuJcvRsT-Lyq4o_WuuJSASOFET-ICIonWI=)

I talk a lot about Hoosier values when I'm talking to people across the 2nd District. One of those values is the belief that, if you make a promise, you keep it. If you say you're going to do something, you do it.

This value seems to be lost on Honeywell. They aren't stopping payments for retiree benefits because they can't afford to. They are doing it because they don't want to pay for it.

Our retirees are going to feel the impact when shopping to put food on the table, when they fall ill, and every time they pick up the phone to schedule a doctor's appointment.

**Our member of Congress should be standing with these workers, but she isn 't. She's taken tens of thousands of dollars from Honeywell's PAC. You can guess who she sides with. **

She's choosing to stand with the corporation. I'm choosing to stand with the employees and retirees.

[**And I hope you 'll do the same. Sign our petition today in unity with the workers and retirees of Honeywell.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VdCIQE6lyKTKn36NF6VbkMoi0kgr80-mgBVk6Ek81x0=/aZBCkKLfvZuJcvRsT-Lyq4o_WuuJSASOFET-ICIonWI=)

Thank you,

Mel Hall

Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
---
Mel Hall for Congress
P.O. Box 862
South Bend, IN 46624 United States

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Ivanka Trump in Steel Country
body:
| |
---
The White House • August 15, 2018
## **Ivanka Trump in Steel Country**
##
**Throughout the past month** , President Donald J. Trump’s [**Pledge to America’s Workers**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE1LjkzNjk5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNS45MzY5OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwODEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/pledge-to-americas-workers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)has been earning commitments from companies in every corner of the country. Ivanka Trump has helped lead the charge, visiting factories, schools, and training facilities in Illinois, Iowa, and elsewhere—often at the President’s side. **In Pittsburgh yesterday** , Ms. Trump met the **[Girls of Steel](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE1LjkzNjk5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNS45MzY5OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwODEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.instagram.com/p/BmefABxFF1A/?hl=en&taken-by=ivankatrump)** robotics team and saw the Peregrine, a new lunar lander that will return America to the Moon. Last week in Illinois, she laid out the Administration’s plan of action. **“Right now, we come second to Mexico** in—not just the public, but—the private sector’s investment in American workers after the age of 22,” she told students and local leaders in Godfrey, Illinois. “So we’ve called upon the private sector to partner with us and to sign, what we call, our Pledge to America’s Workers.” More than 4.2 million new opportunities have been created from the Pledge to date. **Preparing America’s workers** for both the jobs of today and tomorrow is a top priority for President Trump. That’s why the Administration, in particular Ivanka, recently helped secure passage of the Perkins Career and Technical Education Act, which authorizes more than $1 billion in funding for workforce development programs. [**CBS Pittsburgh: Ivanka Trump visits with STEM students**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE1LjkzNjk5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNS45MzY5OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwODEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://pittsburgh.cbslocal.com/2018/08/14/ivanka-trump-pittsburgh-astrobotic-visit/) **The big picture:**[ **“U.S. Workers Get Biggest Pay Increase in Nearly a Decade”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE1LjkzNjk5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNS45MzY5OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwODEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/u-s-employment-costs-rose-in-the-second-quarter-1533040473)
## Bringing home every lost American soldier
##
**Kelly McKeague** , Director of the Defense POW and MIA Accounting Agency, addressed reporters at yesterday’s White House press briefing on the Trump Administration’s effort to bring home American heroes who have been lost at war. **This month’s homecoming** of the remains of Korean War veterans was “a poignant manifestation of the commitments secured by President Trump and pledged by Chairman Kim at the Singapore Summit,” Director McKeague said. “For the families of the 7,700 still unaccounted for from the Korean War, this first step in fulfilling this commitment has undoubtedly provided a seed of hope.” **The Administration is keeping in close touch** with these families. Last week, more than 700 such family members gathered in Arlington, Virginia, to receive updates from the government. “They were resoundingly appreciative of the successful advocacy of the President,” Director McKeague said. [**Watch: Director McKeague on the repatriation of missing Americans**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE1LjkzNjk5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNS45MzY5OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwODEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1029473486169886720) **In photos:[ 65 years later, fallen American soldiers of the Korean War come home](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE1LjkzNjk5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNS45MzY5OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwODEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/photos-65-years-later-fallen-american-soldiers-korean-war-come-home/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump is presented a U.S. flag by Kelly McKeague, director of the Defense Department POW/MIA accounting agency, during an update on the identification of remains returned by North Korea of missing U.S. troops killed during the Korean War** | August 14, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE1LjkzNjk5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNS45MzY5OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwODEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE1LjkzNjk5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNS45MzY5OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwODEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE1LjkzNjk5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNS45MzY5OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwODEwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

subject: 183,000 jobs on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc03c/2a380d31/d51d400/f1b44d/3976015111/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc03c/2a380d31/d51d400/f1b44d/3976015111/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello -- Our country has entered a full-blown trade war with President Trump at the helm, and hard-working Americans like you will pay the price.
Check out some of the headlines:
_" Trump's trade war is already leading to layoffs and pain for American businesses" _- Business Insider, 8/9/2018
_" ...Trump is 'destroying economic growth' with trade war" _- The Hill, 8/12/2018
Trump is rejecting the interests of hard-working families and farmers who deserve a fair shot, so we're compiling a petition to urge him to stop this trade war.
[**Will you please add your name to call on Trump to protect our country 's families and farmers?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc03c/2a380d31/d51d400/f1b44e/3976015111/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/tradewarJA/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018-stop-the-trade-war%3Frefcode%3De20180814_TradeWarJA_up&recurring=auto")
A global trade war isn't just a national issue. It could directly hurt Granite Staters, too.
With roughly 183,000 jobs in New Hampshire alone supported by exports, the impact of Trump's actions could be disastrous.
We can't let Donald Trump use hard-working families as political bargaining chips. That's why we need you to please add your name to tell the Trump administration to stop the trade war:
[**https://hassan.bsd.net/Stop-The-Trade-War**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc03c/2a380d31/d51d400/f1b44e/3976015111/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/tradewarJA/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018-stop-the-trade-war%3Frefcode%3De20180814_TradeWarJA_up&recurring=auto")
Thank you for getting involved,
Team Maggie

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/eCOMhHTzhgIAvjCP7YG3UoqBn3zv0H7laz0yth78Ofs=/rve4q-aVD27eOWUJFuFG4yAMdMm4ny4R42OozvFdLqM=?gpsid=13_36_2876&refcode=em18_180815_oneyr1_fnd_gq_act_rec_TD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180815_oneyr1_fnd_gq_act_rec_TD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)
Peter,

One year ago today, Paul Davis announced his candidacy for the United States Congress.

The leaders we chose to send to Washington weren't representing Kansas values anymore; they were ignoring the people they represent and forgetting where they came from. So Paul decided to do something about it.

We've come so far in the last year, but it's going to take a lot of resources to beat the D.C. political machine and Steve Watkins this November. **[Will you commit to chipping in $5 or more each month until Election Day?](https://act.myngp.com/el/eCOMhHTzhgIAvjCP7YG3UoqBn3zv0H7laz0yth78Ofs=/rve4q-aVD27eOWUJFuFG4yAMdMm4ny4R42OozvFdLqM=?gpsid=13_36_2876&refcode=em18_180815_oneyr1_fnd_gq_act_rec_TD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180815_oneyr1_fnd_gq_act_rec_TD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)**

Now that the primary is over, there are special interests and dark money groups out there spending millions on negative, false attack ads to try and convince you that Paul is not the leader we need.

But that's not going to stop us: since day one, this campaign has been a grassroots effort to bring people together, not drive them apart, and we're so thankful you've been a part of it this far. **[Help us keep the momentum going and elect Paul Davis to Congress this November by pledging to make a monthly donation from now until Election Day.](https://act.myngp.com/el/eCOMhHTzhgIAvjCP7YG3UoqBn3zv0H7laz0yth78Ofs=/rve4q-aVD27eOWUJFuFG4yAMdMm4ny4R42OozvFdLqM=?gpsid=13_36_2876&refcode=em18_180815_oneyr1_fnd_gq_act_rec_TD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180815_oneyr1_fnd_gq_act_rec_TD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)**

Thank you,

Team Davis

clean_body: Peter, One year ago today, Paul Davis announced his candidacy for the United States Congress. The leaders we chose to send to Washington weren't representing Kansas values anymore; they were ignoring the people they represent and forgetting where they came from. So Paul decided to do something about it. We've come so far in the last year, but it's going to take a lot of resources to beat the D.C. political machine and Steve Watkins this November. Now that the primary is over, there are special interests and dark money groups out there spending millions on negative, false attack ads to try and convince you that Paul is not the leader we need. But that's not going to stop us: since day one, this campaign has been a grassroots effort to bring people together, not drive them apart, and we're so thankful you've been a part of it this far. Thank you, Team Davis Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas Paul Davis for Congress PO Box 944 Lawrence KS 66044 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

body:
We had to take on the naysayers, the out-of-state mega donors, and swamp tactics... And throughout it all,we delivered our conservative message....

Friend, when we started this race we knew it wouldn't be easy.

We had to take on the naysayers, the out-of-state mega donors, and swamp tactics...

And throughout it all, we delivered our conservative message all across the state.

In May, we won at convention. But last night, we won at the polls.

And friend, I want to say THANK YOU for everything you did to make it happen.

We fought hard, we fought honorably for a good mission, and we proved that the America First, grassroots conservative movement is alive and well. And we're coming for Senator Baldwin!

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0a0da9c72cca4dc6848d1e39b281ffcf&_e=VfAJ0ivHqwr_psN0ZJLtzIsAkr1t1OYhVl_BneypY8E2EQ1ZwiTSbCQ_WHHdZHBCn2JpYEGnrUkV7IjR2QF2GADSv_-o8BL2tIq4bR9HvLnEmT8bc-675xfJEY7okEIklEIM4-mwPpybMKRBcHt2AfUC7bJtG3IUOdhnbQoWSwUQFT6Cub4x1n20es0fCJ2ySODMC0dI0efJVZS1F3xrUU3Jm0k0lRgX3atlbc_55PonGauJ3GLP9m5kN6wtoxHS). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0a0da9c72cca4dc6848d1e39b281ffcf&_e=pRQ7H3ik-_eT3D37KcDQL87E5xly711K5pKI1u7etZtoln5bDe00E8w2c2wMp_9lv3oQHTCBRDK9aVTiIXGU2IUSLapBt4q7How4bLe_rY1yIyGL4bCPidduF6Pfl8_qVF9ao0F3B00UWO9F_5OE3pzz412JMVGa9FVLcPL1lsZ_p35JwbhoIebuWVOiuqKWaRAvnTBhtD-fjFuMZsfRZU2-8iqwjG3qHQagd5ht8r5WRYeLJuDkvJUSaP_uIHqS171MdiGyFIHLrXceN_b-dOF9_yrPVk0zcN0La6X1tcwsuxATHqHLYWN7JF-L0BwkWs_psKmaVmj6SDFGwW3KhHYIAOhd9PAfpfr7-aJ8IzVTf_FGc6HTnbNabC-ukpl2) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0a0da9c72cca4dc6848d1e39b281ffcf&_e=pRQ7H3ik-_eT3D37KcDQL87E5xly711K5pKI1u7etZuEddfSLfD2NoGCIkrKUrZi36EAptPaZhnxD-sP9BynGEvW53ajUNh3TdK4s75QrdieIoVIloH4ppQBm8sD8tBHfvlYfCbQ37skgcqOvcX13XwtSl4hqYnAoghFs9IJSVmQbhxi7GLJIgSoX5iLEevxI_hTUAV4IPFOjFunszKv0DTs0-LW0gioNuS6p5gayn-3fuhDqARgm_cqzNW949ZfYcQVAmA7ev5RdVEk5FZQya2nQIhWPe8bOrJypvAPG_vjTysx8ILtWUIDgU9_Lrn7MPJMySNZT7H1efLxDo3Z6wQn8QZgDAA20MJVoxbPBkScsL3SQ3zxsz16bl6VfRx-) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0a0da9c72cca4dc6848d1e39b281ffcf&_e=pRQ7H3ik-_eT3D37KcDQL3UWa5ejoLM-RC2abETvNKT6fbk60KgXHFft3KkCHbTL6RKpXexvlOOIfeR_Xf7mEwc24u5WTyNjnuMRuDSu3-94nO5_8Uzj10KgfPs2DBbAFfuLGo76-SGlNU9kWPh5tHGxHZhYauXLkQwGxiVgMb8xSuIRsL23lvS8Qi2z9TQnk6bcIfXVN1ZaG_G-yNA0bLKUja1WtT32dnjHImX5hpubOXojMDIubd0x5HaKjQ8YExoD58zQyjTucMwsBhqhVw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0a0da9c72cca4dc6848d1e39b281ffcf&_e=pRQ7H3ik-_eT3D37KcDQL-ax8C5OA2Ku53OXxdek_sFfenbYpwrBAEPJJHVNTbjtk3Rft_EVv0DHnrKKfDDfJE72rmoG-s2sBGxryoIiZ-dKBNP35aUugLjxBD-Lb36SvwYKQCBc0jkr6Ov196c6R-SRYXaYYkDXUykNTHhDUao-7QkL4qqE7GfjGzweRsBRTbFucVtSfNdcVzLuh9x3y9yGQbTjQrE47SVn6sveGPQJSDeg6dbfmHMMRnbcqtV5x_U04oV9Vg7xXvXR5FBMjQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0a0da9c72cca4dc6848d1e39b281ffcf&_e=pRQ7H3ik-_eT3D37KcDQL1T2VnQSwQsBA92qeDBTfZvZfAYZZ9pdmbmvq9_08sqIuEX2og92T7BFzMTMVIF5psgAGvQoZC-N2vdVVkWuGhs-FE7YJD_8wuCSH5tV1CPNWxOiWcjmdprL0g5VWLvhTwKcegfAylJhQN94y0HyOle89wHQF5cPr8J5lKPop3gB5X38IPKi8AcepzvJzE1vbcpEFh48zLIye2L04UqboRmuAeGkZO2-LZfY8STWAhMGOs6IU5XpERvUheQpzjwqjQ%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0a0da9c72cca4dc6848d1e39b281ffcf&_e=pRQ7H3ik-_eT3D37KcDQL87E5xly711K5pKI1u7etZuuvWlqnVt08MLmgqxwHsj5YGhelUu4rqscLDR6U7ugSHOXdOr1Q10_DSr7mTV-4YR3QDT1HRfW1qcLkhlrZ2SswWfi_5ePPLN1H8kMN07qL3sVpYIfO6RFrN2H628pYhhNRj0mNCbLsZQBgRfcsxQpTdopKfCaZy3JVirAo8YibCy8-WCShjQafOtgL71AMPHv07y9Rh0QdSdPnSAoqFXTQrMSzLvMdvMwumPRMGEB23alcMOcSK7zV-WUKT2aizoLS_DG3SAUNaH1xo6LdTNs5AHc9arcH8nUmd8_QH2xA-N76QQK80cBfyhMAwFUMFP_OQq6A2nDQfkc4sfm0ZkmDoBbg8btpYWuLvR8J8wuYQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. name: Bob Corney, Bredesen 2018
subject: Our opponent’s top strategist: Super PACs and outside groups are "part of your campaign now”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
|
#
Peter -- Just last month, our opponent’s top strategist was caught on leaked audio from a closed-door event saying **Super PACs and out-of-state dark money groups are “part of your campaign now. name: Jason Yates
subject: FRWD: I’ve never been more certain of this
body:
Peter,
I want to make sure you saw this email from Mike Huckabee last week and give you a quick and exciting update!
Thanks to faithful supporters like you, My Faith Votes met the $10,000 matching grant!
And now we just had _another_ generous donor step up and challenge us with an additional $20,000 matching grant to go even further and fully meet our goal for our college and university campaign!
We are picking up momentum but we can’t stop now. With your donation today, you'll help us meet this $20,000 match and fully fund this effort!
Please use the link below to make your best donation to engage the next generation of Christians to vote!
[https://www.myfaithvotes.org/becauseIcare](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2FbecauseIcare&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180815apl01nd&n=1)
Blessings,
-Jason
Jason Yates, CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180815apl01nd&n=2)
* * *
**From:** Gov. Mike Huckabee <info@myfaithvotes.org>
**Sent:** Thursday, August 9, 2018 11:36
**To:** Jason Yates <jason@myfaithvotes.org>
**Subject:** I’ve never been more certain of this
Jason,
As part of _My Faith Votes_ ' plan to reach 51 million people of faith and get nonvoters to the polls, we are now digging even deeper to reach a couple groups that are often overlooked at our own peril – Millennials and Generation Z.
Combined, Millennials and Generation Z represent 69.2 million eligible voters, the largest voting bloc in U.S. history, and yet they are the generations with the lowest voter participation.
**It is imperative that we get these young people off the sidelines and standing for biblical values, and here's how we can do it...**
_My Faith Votes_ is once again partnering with a group called im2moro to inspire and equip nearly 1 million young students to vote in November. Specifically, we will reach 300,000 students on 100 Christian college campuses in targeted states, and at least another 600,000 through their social media and mobile connections.
With these students living away from home, we will use proven technology to simplify the process for each student to get registered and successfully cast an absentee ballot.
**[I'm told this initiative will cost approximately $60,000 and the good news is that a very generous donor has committed to match at least $10,000 of what we're able to raise online. Will you help us reach our goal with a tax-deductible donation right now](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180815apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180815apl01nd&n=3)?**
If you're wondering if your donation will make a difference, let me share something incredible with you.
In 2016, we ran this campaign on 41 Christian university campuses. We reached 150,000 students, and **73% of those students who used our tools voted in the election!** That is near twice the voting rate of their peers!
And most of their peers aren’t voting for biblical values.
Let me ask you...have you heard of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez? She is the 28-year-old self-described socialist millennial who beat a Democratic incumbent Congressman in the New York Congressional primary earlier this year.
She has drawn national attention to her campaign because of her extreme socialist views, and many are asking, “is there hope for the next generation of politicians? Can they overcome a socialist mentality?”
The answer is “YES!”
**_My Faith Votes_ has a proven plan to engage the next generation on Christian University Campuses across the nation, to be defenders of our values in the public square!**
And that’s why we’re more than doubling our efforts from 2016 in a commitment to turn these young Christians into lifelong voters who will vote from a biblical worldview.
This is not a theory. We have proven results. Now it's time to put our resources to work once again in order to get these young voters off the sidelines in 2018, and I have no doubt whatsoever that we can get it done.
**[Jason, thanks to the generous matching grant, your donation will be doubled up to $10,000! Please help us reach our financial goal with a tax-deductible donation now. We're itching to get to work and deliver another victory for our Judeo-Christian values](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180815apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180815apl01nd&n=4).**
Thank you so much for your ongoing support, we truly cannot do this without you.
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180815apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180815apl01nd&n=5)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180815apl01nd&n=6)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180815apl01nd&n=7).

name: Bill McKibben, The Sanders Institute
subject: What Can I Do?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
Every day, people ask me - what can I do to fight climate change?
#
Friend,
Every day, people ask me - what can I do to fight climate change? There are many actions that each one of us can take now and throughout our lives, from bicycling to work to installing solar power. But the biggest thing that anyone can do to fight climate change is to **become a little less of an individual.**
Individually, we can reduce each of our carbon footprints slightly. Individually, we can use less electricity and not rely on fossil fuels... **But together, we can save the planet.**
Together, we can make governments, institutions, and corporations divest from fossil fuel. Together, we can elect candidates who vow to keep carbon in the ground. And together, we can use our collective voice to move our local communities, states, and nation to 100% renewable energy.
**[These are big goals that we can only accomplish through movements. In this video, I lay out some of the ways that we can come together to force change and to save our world.](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a988/bed43eb/7c069081/75fc866a/413726289/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/what-can-i-do-about-climate-change")**
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a988/bed43eb/7c069081/75fc866a/413726289/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/what-can-i-do-about-climate-change")
**Be a part of the movement. Please join me at the Rise for Climate, Jobs & Justice global day of action this September 8th. You can find an event near you at [riseforclimate.org](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a988/bed43eb/7c069081/75fc8695/413726289/VEsF/ "https://riseforclimate.org/").**
In Solidarity,
Bill McKibben
Sanders Institute Founding Fellow
**[DONATE»](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a988/bed43eb/7c069081/75fc8694/413726289/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em180815")**
PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
131 CHURCH STREET
BURLINGTON, VT 05401

The Sanders Institute is a tax-exempt 501(c)(3) organization.
131 Church Street, Burlington, VT 05401
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a988/bed43eb/7c069081/75fc8697/413726289/VEsD/ "https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")

name: Deputy Campaign Manager Sarah Neibart
subject: NYT: NJ Senate Race an “Unexpected Battle”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
Even The New York Times recognizes the strength of our campaign against corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez due to a “significant number of voters | |
---
|
---
Peter,

Even _**[The New York Times](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=37dee5bb51e14d89a5a28ea99bf64767&_e=uANPuvofslA4C6FfxdURDXeLpE-vCTWS-6MdcX88K8MY8dMSBphtVaWBwNSOtB4of19j93IFx8m7m8S6r_az74wMZY_bQNayi1rmN7B5QmcPFENaUY0QdLGe79IYs2nqCWKJzEzxkQVS83_CklB8c30OFOsVTYGEy8xSVyJfuYGalKae92NHzcPTT5pWpC68sW9Jlk8sz7dcqBTa7gZXPklc77mP0r9tcl-FohHks4MOuc2tw2hLJggEz_0YqlxuCOZhpQHYGCN7R_lwx-LvLGkD3XQ3wdUev3ExIPV5GMbA-0lOG_fVo6hCe2jNU1SLcRzq3Xxyj8U5I2T_gDe-0Js9sSuXpsbKghwBfgLiH12vy7nV4UOeZv-LmLaGI11GK5IQFTnQQaVL1WUk_JeXMuTOQpRxUeEF4skoqi8uCgI%3D)**_ recognizes the strength of our campaign against corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez due to a _**“significant number of voters [viewing] Mr. Menendez unfavorably, according to recent polls.”**_
|
---
New Jerseyans know they deserve better than a Senator who sold his office to a rich Florida donor who was scamming seniors, blinding patients, and overcharging for treatments to steal over $70 million from Medicare. **Even Democrats don’t want to vote for Bob Menendez because of how he has disgraced and embarrassed our state.**
We’re making sure voters hear Bob Hugin’s positive message of putting New Jersey first and getting things done in Washington. After spending 25 years in Washington as a career politician, Bob Menendez’s only accomplishment has been a track record of corruption and failing to get results. New Jersey deserves better.

With less than 12 weeks to Election Day, public polls show our race is a dead heat. Come November, we will elect Marine veteran and job creator Bob Hugin, a Senator that we can all be proud of.
[ **Join #TeamHugin** ](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=37dee5bb51e14d89a5a28ea99bf64767&_e=uANPuvofslA4C6FfxdURDQ2eNKChMCBjiel4zY9E6RQMwtDdWZM4ZjhBOngrlV4han4PC3vwHWDU44IUf3ZvJEyiqX9gWQsPbYXdKIODgoAP8b7s-QJB1DIoAMWndkbLmDNj-mRkG1xpM-IO-45DnggXbiOYR5dtSMZ8AXW45-6VXqM7oUO5MMkIm6jG4pjxsDSzxNqE0dmzkvGdBH61K55R_c0zYeHxPkVHixSIK3XAKUSsa3VVVbUlKIkNC_YIRGPvQxVVtYMKgkpwLceMnUDlA-vmbH07FLRpzovVYhHyl5jc_a-1_BBhJWc3PCbJNrIR7za8KJ07IgijfZCjVVsRouxrIjuXZp7k971Wrz-X4Bc6HHe-pZHQlFaFCzkY)
Sarah Neibart

Deputy Campaign Manager

body:

Will you help close the gap by donating $5 or more before tomorrow's midnight deadline?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b4df/7ab0e2c4/7fdd6cc9/349b04ec/3636294255/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08158A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b4df/7ab0e2c4/7fdd6cc9/349b04ef/3636294255/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08158A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

---
Larry Hogan is already pouring money into TV ads painting Ben's ideas as "pie-in-the-sky," and right-wing groups in Maryland are asking for donations to put up billboards along highways that portray Ben as a communist.
I'm serious -- they're covered with communist symbols and name him "Comrade Ben."
We're never going to have the corporate money that Larry Hogan has, because that's simply not what this campaign is about. It's built by you, for you, and we depend on grassroots donations of $5, $25, and $50 to sustain our momentum.
**I hope you'll chip in before this critical end-of-month deadline -- Republicans are watching and hoping we fall short.** [**Donate $5 or more now before our midnight deadline to help us raise our final $2,450!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b4df/7ab0e2c4/7fdd6cc9/349b04ec/3636294255/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08158A")
Thanks,
Erica
Erica Bernstein
Finance Director
Ben Jealous for Governor

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b4df/7ab0e2c4/7fdd6cc9/349b04ec/3636294255/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08158A")

**We're still $10,766 short of our $500,000 FEC Mid-Quarter goal, so we're opening up our Mid-Quarter Match program.[If you give in the next 14 hours, your contribution will be matched.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff8bc/4462dc26/6dcc10bb/200746ca/2901619875/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180815am?refcode=sbe180815am_a")**

Vice President Pence was back in Ohio campaigning for Sherrod's opponent yesterday. A Koch-linked group is on the attack. Congressman Jim Renacci is all set up to air another ad.
**We're losing ground and the other side will stop at nothing to kick Sherrod out of the Senate.** Pence has plenty of battleground states to spend his time in -- _he wouldn't keep coming to Ohio if he didn't think Renacci could win._
Sherrod relies on this grassroots team to fuel our campaign. We can't let him down. [**Every dollar you give today will be matched. Please, if at all possible, chip in today towards re-electing Sherrod.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff8bc/4462dc26/6dcc10bb/200746ca/2901619875/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180815am?refcode=sbe180815am_a")

Team Sherrod

name: Steve Bullock
subject: important email [Please Read Now]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Big Sky Values PAC, 3242 Cummins Way, Missoula, MT 59802, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | _Steve Bullock's Big Sky Values PAC is dedicated to taking action on the issues that matter to Democrats. If you 'd like to only receive our most important email updates, [click here.](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66b9/1044929961/VEsH/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/s/less-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a6/1044929961/VEsE/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/unsubscribe")_

---
I want to hear about what issues matter to you.------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | **[Please, I need you to take my really short issues survey.](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a7/1044929961/VEsF/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/s/-1-important-issues-survey?source=MS_EM_SURV_2018.06.13_X_Issues-Surv_R1__F1_S1_C1__intro")**

Democrats are at a crossroads. And we need input from _everyone_ to rebuild our Party from the ground up. It's the only way to move forward. | [Please Respond Now ->](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a7/1044929961/VEsC/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/s/-1-important-issues-survey?source=MS_EM_SURV_2018.06.13_X_Issues-Surv_R1__F1_S1_C1__intro")
---
I won't sugar coat it. This past year has been tough. It has been a time of extreme political turmoil and divisiveness.

I've watched too many Republicans and even some Democrats go down a road that leads to division and pits the coasts against the rest of the country. I wholeheartedly believe we must call out the indignities of President Trump, but as Democrats we can't make that our only message to voters _across_ the country.

**[I'm here to tell you, I'm not going down that road.](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a7/1044929961/VEsD/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/s/-1-important-issues-survey?source=MS_EM_SURV_2018.06.13_X_Issues-Surv_R1__F1_S1_C1__intro")**

Governing, enacting progressive policies, and winning elections requires us to tell all Americans how we're going to create jobs and make their lives better. I've learned that firsthand here in Montana.

In 2016, President Trump won Montana by more than _20 percent_. At the same time, I was re-elected as our Democratic Governor by four percent.

How? I talked about and acted on the key issues voters care about, like:
* Getting Big Money out of politics
* Preserving Medicaid
* Protecting our public lands
* And growing our economy and creating jobs

**[Now, I need to hear from you. It's the only way we'll build a coalition to win. So I have to ask: will you take my really short issues survey?](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a7/1044929961/VEsA/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/s/-1-important-issues-survey?source=MS_EM_SURV_2018.06.13_X_Issues-Surv_R1__F1_S1_C1__intro")**
[Please Respond Now ->](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a7/1044929961/VEsB/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/s/-1-important-issues-survey?source=MS_EM_SURV_2018.06.13_X_Issues-Surv_R1__F1_S1_C1__intro")
---
As a Democrat in Montana, I don't have the luxury of spending the day talking only to people who agree with me. **And I think that must become a national rule.** We can't assume that voters, even those who disagree with us or didn't vote for us, can't be won by sharing the values we as Democrats are fighting for.

So we're going to do what I did in Montana: we're going to listen to people. We're going to talk to people in deep blue districts and we're going to talk to people in districts Trump won by 20 points. And we're going to do all that while focusing on the issues that matter: creating an America where working folks can succeed, preserving Medicare and Medicaid while expanding access to quality healthcare, ending the flood of Dark Money in our elections, and raising the minimum wage.

**[That open dialogue starts today. I want to hear about what issues matter to you. Please, take a second to fill out my issues survey:](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a7/1044929961/VEsO/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/s/-1-important-issues-survey?source=MS_EM_SURV_2018.06.13_X_Issues-Surv_R1__F1_S1_C1__intro")**
[Click to Begin ->](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a7/1044929961/VEsP/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/s/-1-important-issues-survey?source=MS_EM_SURV_2018.06.13_X_Issues-Surv_R1__F1_S1_C1__intro")
---
Can't wait to get started,

Steve Bullock

| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ Click here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a4/1044929961/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a5/1044929961/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Missoula, MT 59802,

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com| Change or update your email address by clicking [here.](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a2/1044929961/VEsHBw/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/s/update-your-info-")

Big Sky Values is dedicated to connecting with Democrats all over the country and taking action on the issues that matter. To learn more, click [here](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a3/1044929961/VEsHBg/ "https://www.ourbigskyvalues.org/").

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to create a strong coalition of Democrats across America, we need you with us every step of the way.

If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a6/1044929961/VEsHAQ/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/unsubscribe"). If you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66b9/1044929961/VEsHAA/ "https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please click [here](https://act.ourbigskyvalues.org/page/m/63eb8627/6aee0046/429c6dbb/2e2e66a0/1044929961/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bsv-responder?refcode=footer&recurring=auto").

From the entire Big Sky Values team, thanks for your support!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Exciting news from last night!
body:
** The primary results are in!
------------------------------------------------------------

While Ian may have gone unopposed in the primary, he was still on the ballot and so he managed to win a few votes. Ian won so many votes, in fact, that he came very close to matching Tom Emmer.

Ian Todd- 33,853
Tom Emmer- 34,251

We came up just 398 votes short of matching Tom in primary votes, and Democrats on the whole were neck and neck with republicans in the 6th district. This means that while we are behind, we are closing in. To put this into a greater context, in the 2016 primary Democrats only got 9,566 votes while republicans had 19,771 voters in the primary. We have taken their 2 to 1 advantage and almost entirely closed the gap!

** Will your support be what tips the scale in November?
------------------------------------------------------------
Every minute and every dollar counts now that we are just a few months away from November, its no secret that our campaign is a grassroots effort that has struggled to raise money compared to more historically competitive districts, but if the primary results are any indication, our district is in play and we need your help now more than ever!

I am asking you today, not only to donate (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=tipthescale&amount=200&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=a61c4b74a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_08_15_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-a61c4b74a6-9291445) to our campaign, but to share your support of our campaign with your friends and family, and let them know that our district has an opportunity like never before!
Tip the Scale in our Favor! (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=tipthescale&amount=200&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=a61c4b74a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_08_15_03_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-a61c4b74a6-9291445)

name: Adam Spanberger
subject: taking notice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
From the beginning, I've known that Abby has the vision and the tenacity it will take to win this race for Virginia families. So it's been pretty exciting to see the rest of the world catch up and take notice of her amazing candidacy, too.
| | Peter, As her husband, it's been incredible to see Abby's campaign grow from the beginning. At the start, it was a small group of us who knew and believed in Abby, working from our kitchen to share her story. Now, we're a team of 2,300+ volunteers strong, and we're giving Dave Brat a run for his money in what has become a toss-up race. [_**(It 's never too late to join -- you can make a donation here to keep us growing, so we can keep knocking doors and sharing Abby's story with voters!)**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ls_V2LHiCiqkCQExdqmkOU9QCgQLTGs0kJUXqDVe1L8=/twYHFACUh3XBAHeQtoDyazb7pmGz0ZBxNRY0MSSeVS8=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.15_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) From the beginning, I've known that Abby has the vision and the tenacity it will take to win this race for Virginia families. **So it 's been pretty exciting to see the rest of the world catch up and take notice of her amazing candidacy, too.** Over the past two weeks, Abby has been recognized in a range of national news publications -- **from _The Wall Street Journal,_ which featured Abby's background as a CIA officer in a recent story, to _The New York Times._** And here's _Politico,_ noting that Abby is presenting 7th district voters with a welcome, consensus-building alternative to Dave Brat's Tea Party voting record: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ls_V2LHiCiqkCQExdqmkOU9QCgQLTGs0kJUXqDVe1L8=/twYHFACUh3XBAHeQtoDyazb7pmGz0ZBxNRY0MSSeVS8=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.15_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) This influx of national attention is a testament to the strength of Abby's candidacy, our campaign's momentum and, above all else, the power of you, our supporters. **We 're building something incredible here in Virginia's 7th district, $5 and $10 at a time.** [**Peter, would you make a grassroots donation today so we can continue to grow our team, and then turn this toss-up race into a win in November?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ls_V2LHiCiqkCQExdqmkOU9QCgQLTGs0kJUXqDVe1L8=/twYHFACUh3XBAHeQtoDyazb7pmGz0ZBxNRY0MSSeVS8=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.15_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) I'm so proud of Abby and all we have accomplished so far this year. Your support is what will keep us going through November. Thank you, Adam [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ls_V2LHiCiqkCQExdqmkOU9QCgQLTGs0kJUXqDVe1L8=/twYHFACUh3XBAHeQtoDyazb7pmGz0ZBxNRY0MSSeVS8=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.15_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

name: Team Bredesen
subject: That’s not all → Our opponent’s top strategist: Super PACs and outside groups are "part of your campaign now”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
|
#
Peter, did you catch Bob’s message? If you hadn’t already heard, clinging to Super PACs and dark money groups isn’t the only thing we heard from our opponent’s chief strategist. He also said they’ll win this race by inflicting **“death by 10,000 cuts”** on Governor Bredesen’s campaign and creating what he called **“a very good controversy.”** And he made no secret of how negative their campaign against Governor Bredesen will be, saying: **“We’re going to constantly punch him in his face... over and over and over again.”** While our opponent aims to divide and scare Tennesseans with half-truths and misinformation, Governor Bredesen is committed to bringing people together and getting things done for Tennessee. name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott?=
subject: Thank You -- On to November!
body:
I’m grateful to have received my party’s nomination, and I thank each and every person who supported me. |
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=60396f6bf1&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=bca6c457d9&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=68067fa8ef&e=19cebfe173) | [Tweet](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=83a015229b&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=bdd3e8b7fc&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=bdd3e8b7fc&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| Friend,
---
| I’m grateful to have received my party’s nomination, and I thank each and every person who supported me.

I commend Keith and his team for stepping up to run. It’s not easy to put yourself out there, but our democracy and party are better off when people do. And congratulations to Christine Hallquist, the Democratic nominee.

I want to thank those Republicans who have stuck with me through thick and thin, and all of those who have put aside partisanship to engage in the Primary. It says something very important about Vermont -- about the type of candidates we want to nominate -- and the good work my team and I have done to grow the economy, make Vermont more affordable and protect the vulnerable.

I went into this Primary with my eyes wide open. I know there are some who are still upset and who may not welcome the result. But there is so much more that unites us than sets us apart, and no one agrees with their friends all of the time.

But, as our success shows, we can make a lot of good progress when we have clear priorities and pull in the same direction.

In just 19 months we’ve reduced income tax rates by $30 million; we’ve eliminated the tax on Social Security for low and moderate-income seniors; and we prevented $71 million in property tax rate increases.

We expanded treatment for opiate addiction and eliminated the long waiting lists, and we also invested an additional $5 million in technical education, job training and higher education, and $2 million more in childcare for working families.

We’ve made the largest single investment in housing in the state’s history -- creating $100 million in construction activity and about 1000 related jobs -- the largest investment in cleaner water we’ve ever made, and there are about 4500 more workers in the workforce than when I took office.

And those are just a few examples. But the fact is, there still much more to do.

Looking ahead, as I’ve consistently done in my political life, I will run a positive, issues-based campaign over the next 3 months -- talking to Vermonters about the things that matter most to them, and working everyday to grow the economy, make Vermont more affordable and protect the vulnerable. Campaigns are about choices, and as this campaign goes on, Vermonters will recognize there is a very clear choice in the November election.

Thank you again for your support, and thank you for proving that Vermonters value leadership that puts principle ahead of politics.

On to November,

Phil

---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=07ba7d81a3&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3002005fed&e=19cebfe173)
---

---

P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05602

body:
You've probably heard by now, the GOP has been going after Debbie a lot this summer. Her five opponents are pulling out all the stops and a Koch-linked group has already come after her.
|
---
| | You've probably heard by now, the GOP has been going after Debbie a lot this summer. Her five opponents are pulling out all the stops and a Koch-linked group has already come after her. But Debbie tries not to pay attention to attacks. She calls it "gator skin" -- thick and impenetrable by attacks from the other side. Debbie has a job to do: Protect Florida families. That's what she focuses on, no matter what attacks come. **But it's not a job she can do by herself.** These attacks can work if they go unanswered. name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: This Has to Stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/this-has-to-stop?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2f95fde17f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Friends -

It took him far too long, but today Democrat Joe Donnelly __finally__ __ met with President Trump's latest pick for the U.S. Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh.

For weeks, Hoosiers, including our Republican nominee for the U.S. Senate, Mike Braun, have been asking him to take this meeting and to commit to confirming Judge Kavanaugh. So why did Democrat Donnelly delay?

**Well, it's all because his party boss, Chuck Schumer, told him to stall. That's right. New York liberal Chuck Schumer is attempting to block Judge Kavanaugh's nomination, and he's using Democrat Joe Donnelly and one of Hoosiers' critical votes in the U.S. Senate to do it.

Chuck Schumer and Democrat Donnelly are playing games with the Supreme Court. **

**This has to stop. **

---
| [HELP US END THE OBSTRUCTION](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f6d206952e&e=1acd9bb3d6 "HELP US END THE OBSTRUCTION")
---
|
Polling shows that Hoosiers want to see Judge Kavanaugh, a highly-qualified jurist, confirmed to the U.S. Supreme Court, leaving a long-lasting legacy on our nation for years to come.

**It's time for Democrat Donnelly to dispense with the waffling and the uncertainty and make it clear that he will support this nomination without further delay.

And it's time for Hoosiers to send in a true conservative to the U.S. Senate, Mike Braun, who will consistently stand with President Donald Trump and Hoosiers. We shouldn't be wondering if Mike Braun would confirm Judge Kavanaugh...we already know.**

Would you [be willing to chip in $25, $50, $100, $250 or more](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d51e7c9ca&e=1acd9bb3d6) to help us replace Party Boss Chuck Schumer's pawn, Democrat Joe Donnelly, with conservative outsider Mike Braun?
For the future of our nation, it's critical that we have a U.S. Senator who will vote with us..and who we know will vote to confirm Judge Kavanaugh...but until then, we can plan to see continued obstruction from Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders and their pawn, Democrat Joe Donnelly.

-Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---
| [LET'S DEFEAT DEMOCRAT JOE DONNELLY!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=adeef5a119&e=1acd9bb3d6 "LET'S DEFEAT DEMOCRAT JOE DONNELLY!")

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: What unites us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
Yesterday DFLers across Minnesota turned out in record numbers to vote in the Primary and now we're just 83 days away from this critical November election.
We understand the enormous stakes on the ballot for our families, our communities, and our country. And we also understand that what unites us is so much stronger than any of our differences.
**Last night I congratulated my colleague Senator Tina Smith on her victory, as well as the great Governor/Lt. Governor team of Tim Walz and Peggy Flanagan. I heard Erin Murphy 's gracious and heartfelt endorsement of Tim; I'm thankful for Erin's fantastic grassroots campaign, and also for Lori Swanson's service to our state, as well as her support for Tim.**
**Now is the time to come together and unite behind a ticket that is ready to work for the people of Minnesota and ready to win in November.**
When I first ran for the U.S. Senate, I knew I would be outspent by my opponent. But I had grassroots supporters like you on my side, knocking on doors, making phone calls, talking to neighbors, and helping me become the first woman elected to the Senate from Minnesota.
I have a feeling 2018 is going to be another historic election.
I can't remember a time in recent years where we've seen more energy and activism among citizens of all ages and backgrounds, some of whom have never been involved in politics before. _We can 't let up now._
We have a President who needs a check and balance in Congress.**That unites us.**
We have an Administration that is putting health coverage for Americans with pre-existing conditions at risk.**That unites us.**
An Administration that is rolling back environmental protections and ignoring warnings and clear evidence about climate change.**That unites us.**
And we need to do something about skyrocketing prescription drug prices.**That unites us.**
**Everything is on the line, but I know we 're up for it.**
So join our team and **[pledge to volunteer](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=RWxalJyCb1D6q%2Bhtb4JcR1%2FGTXDUIcdC).** You can march in a parade, write a letter to the editor, take a lawn sign for your yard, or knock on doors -- just visit [**amyklobuchar.com/help**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BOg17vIUsbeTH8FTEL%2FkwjrMfHmzB%2Fdn).
Because like my friend Paul Wellstone said, "The future will not belong to those who sit on the sidelines."
Thank you for all your hard work to build a brighter future for our state and country.
\-- Amy

[**Contribute**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MiOproioQ%2FJEvTpiJSVSWl%2FGTXDUIcdC)
---

[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=LqMPhXaBMJS1TqMz43L%2FpEduAYfCVIC9)
---
[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YMUkWGkrgYCiT2o5ZKassV%2FGTXDUIcdC)
[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=KFY2zSOpGYZxUmLsskuKSl%2FGTXDUIcdC)

name: betofortexas.com
subject: Mitch McConnell sounding the alarm
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

“Senate Leadership Fund, a top GOP super PAC aligned with Senate Majority Leader
Mitch McConnell, put Sen. Ted Cruz's reelection campaign on its watch list
today, pledging to support the Texas Republican this fall should the need
arise.”

POLITICO | August 14, 2018

This is big
news: Mitch McConnell’s super PAC just announced they’re ready to spend
big against Beto this fall.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/5557?refcode=em20180815&t=1019&akid=3959%2E444211%2EkvItFk ]We’ll cut to the chase: this is urgent, and we need you to step up
right now. Rush a donation of
$3
to Beto’s campaign.

Mitch McConnell probably never expected his super PAC would need to spend
a dime in Texas to help Ted Cruz keep his seat. When we launched our race
over a year ago, pundits on both sides of the aisle told Beto he didn’t
stand a chance of winning against Cruz.

But together, we’ve proved them wrong:

* The most recent polls show Beto and Ted Cruz neck-and-neck.
* Our grassroots team has consistently out-raised Cruz in each FEC
period -- all without taking a dime from PACs.
* We’ve built a massive on-the-ground organizing operation that’s
contacting voters across the state for Beto, laying the groundwork for
victory.

But here’s the problem:
we’re not just up against Ted Cruz. We’re up against his PACs, his super
PAC, and the other special-interest groups backing him up. And now, we got
news that Mitch McConnell is preparing to spend in Texas.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/5557?refcode=em20180815&t=1020&akid=3959%2E444211%2EkvItFk ]Unlike Ted Cruz, Beto doesn’t rely on PACs for his campaign. He relies
100% on people, just like you. Pitch in
a donation of
$3
and help us send a powerful message: we’re not going to let groups buy
this race for Senator Cruz.

This race is only going to get more intense. We’re going to need you every
step of the way.

Let’s give ‘em everything we’ve got.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/5557?refcode=em20180815&t=1021&akid=3959%2E444211%2EkvItFk ]Contribute
$3
»

[ ]We’ll cut to the chase: this is urgent, and we need you to step up right now. Rush a donation of $3 to Beto’s campaign. Mitch McConnell probably never expected his super PAC would need to spend a dime in Texas to help Ted Cruz keep his seat. When we launched our race over a year ago, pundits on both sides of the aisle told Beto he didn’t stand a chance of winning against Cruz. But together, we’ve proved them wrong: The most recent polls show Beto and Ted Cruz neck-and-neck. Our grassroots team has consistently out-raised Cruz in each FEC period -- all without taking a dime from PACs. * We’ve built a massive on-the-ground organizing operation that’s contacting voters across the state for Beto, laying the groundwork for victory. But here’s the problem: we’re not just up against Ted Cruz. We’re up against his PACs, his super PAC, and the other special-interest groups backing him up. And now, we got news that Mitch McConnell is preparing to spend in Texas. [ ]Unlike Ted Cruz, Beto doesn’t rely on PACs for his campaign. He relies 100% on people, just like you. Pitch in a donation of $3 and help us send a powerful message: we’re not going to let groups buy this race for Senator Cruz. This race is only going to get more intense. We’re going to need you every step of the way. Let’s give ‘em everything we’ve got. Team Beto [ ]Contribute $3 » Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Women need Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand's voice in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
Friends,
**My friend Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has tirelessly fought for women 's rights - but she's up for reelection this year and needs our help to keep fighting. **
Kirsten doesn't know the meaning of the word "can't." She's a passionate advocate who refused to be silenced when Donald Trump personally attacked her on Twitter - who refused to quit her battle even when the president publicly smeared her name.
**She 's refused to stop speaking out because she knows that women across the country need her voice - and need her in the Senate in the years to come.**
Kirsten has pledged not to take a single dollar from corporate PACs this cycle. **So today I 'm asking you to donate whatever you can to help reelect Kirsten and prove she doesn't need dark money from big corporations - because she's got grassroots donors like you, determined to keep her fighting for women's rights in 2019 and beyond:**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be evenly split between Jeanne Shaheen and Kirsten Gillibrand:_
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4kg?refcode=jtk849-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4kg?refcode=jtk849-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4kg?refcode=jtk849-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4kg?refcode=jtk849-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Jeanne
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Lindsay Coleman
subject: we've increased our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Things are heating up here in AZ-01 -- so I've increased our mid-month fundraising goal to make sure we can keep our campaign going strong.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d63381d/1a8421e1/1a5057b70/48b2a019/3961523251/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Things are heating up here in AZ-01, team -- so I've increased our mid-month fundraising goal to make sure we can keep our campaign going strong. We're running **$3,211** behind this new online target, though, and our deadline is tomorrow... [**can you make a donation today so we can hit this goal and keep AZ-01 blue in November?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.15_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Now, you might be wondering -- why are we increasing our goals this far along in the election year? _Well, a lot has happened over the past few days ..._
* A GOP Super PAC dropped even MORE MONEY (in addition to an earlier **$50,000!**) to boost one of Tom's far-right opponents.
* The _AZ Daily Sun_ reported that a big national GOP group is planning its biggest investment in Arizona ever, and AZ-01 is one of its top targets.
* Tom is still the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the entire House, so it's on us to make sure these developments don't slow our momentum.

All this news might intimidate some campaigns, team -- but here at Team O'Halleran, we don't get scared in the face of bad news. We get ORGANIZED, which is what this new goal will allow us to do. With [**your support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.15_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer="), we'll continue ramping up our voter outreach efforts and we'll fight the Super PACs with our own ads on TV. [**Please, make a donation today so we can keep it up and win this race >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.15_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Lindsay Coleman Finance Director | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.15_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [_clicking here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d63381d/1a8421e1/1a5057b70/48b2a01c/3961523251/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/update-your-information").

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d63381d/1a8421e1/1a5057b70/48b2a01d/3961523251/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d63381d/1a8421e1/1a5057b70/48b2a01e/3961523251/VEsP/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").
