name: Claire
subject: Hawley's billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCaskill for Missouri
body:
Really need your help, Friend. Just a few weeks ago, President Trump came to Missouri to campaign for Josh Hawley.
My jaw dropped when I saw how much money Hawley demanded for a chance to rub elbows with Trump -- tickets went for $1,000 or more. **Seriously?!**
It's clear Hawley's relying on far-right billionaires (and help from "special guests" like Trump, Pence, and McConnell) to bankroll his campaign.
Personally, I've always depended on a few bucks at a time from grassroots folks like you to keep me fighting another day. **But the truth is, we will lose in November unless we catch up to Hawley 's fundraising ASAP -- and today we still need another 1,000 people to give to reach our $20,000 goal.**
**[Please Friend, I need you to be one of them: Donate $3, or whatever you can, right now-- especially after President Trump's fundraising boost for Hawley -- to help us beat the GOP's candidate this fall.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr?refcode=jtk1228-fr-nd-v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thanks for this. Don't stand a chance of winning without you.
Claire
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr?refcode=jtk1228-fr-nd-v2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Contributions or gifts to McCaskill for Missouri are not tax deductible.

body:

name: Rachel Croopnick
subject: I shouldn't be punished for having a pre-existing condition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSpD08sO-tSfEYoNqyPSnE1hoMp28zCMDiEWRySMoCM=/egbsJ5s4m9wwTUATrX5Ffqr1WXjROfSkqeYealW5RoI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180815_RC_preex_all_logo)
Hi Peter, I'm Rachel.
I live in Rocklin, and I want to share my very personal reason for why I'm supporting Jessica Morse.
Cancer runs in my family--my grandmother was diagnosed with breast cancer at 40, my dad with prostate cancer at 40. Both died from their cancer. Last year, at 25, I tested positive for BRCA 2--one of the breast cancer gene mutations.
This means that, for the rest of my life, insurance companies will categorize me as having a pre-existing condition. But still Tom McClintock casts votes that would allow insurers to deny me affordable, life-saving coverage when I need it most.
**I can 't afford Tom McClintock in office--and if he and his allies repeal our health care, I might not survive it. We need a leader who'll protect our care and our lives. That's why I'm supporting Jessica--and I hope you'll join me by stepping up with your own donation now:**

[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSpD08sO-tSfEYoNqyPSnE1hoMp28zCMDiEWRySMoCM=/egbsJ5s4m9wwTUATrX5Ffqr1WXjROfSkqeYealW5RoI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180815_RC_preex_all_15&amount=15) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSpD08sO-tSfEYoNqyPSnE1hoMp28zCMDiEWRySMoCM=/egbsJ5s4m9wwTUATrX5Ffqr1WXjROfSkqeYealW5RoI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180815_RC_preex_all_25&amount=25)
---|---
[$50 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSpD08sO-tSfEYoNqyPSnE1hoMp28zCMDiEWRySMoCM=/egbsJ5s4m9wwTUATrX5Ffqr1WXjROfSkqeYealW5RoI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180815_RC_preex_all_50&amount=50) | [$100 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSpD08sO-tSfEYoNqyPSnE1hoMp28zCMDiEWRySMoCM=/egbsJ5s4m9wwTUATrX5Ffqr1WXjROfSkqeYealW5RoI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180815_RC_preex_all_100&amount=100)
[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSpD08sO-tSfEYoNqyPSnE1hoMp28zCMDiEWRySMoCM=/egbsJ5s4m9wwTUATrX5Ffqr1WXjROfSkqeYealW5RoI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180815_RC_preex_all_250&amount=250) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSpD08sO-tSfEYoNqyPSnE1hoMp28zCMDiEWRySMoCM=/egbsJ5s4m9wwTUATrX5Ffqr1WXjROfSkqeYealW5RoI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180815_RC_preex_all_other)
About a month ago, my doctors found a mass in my left breast. A biopsy showed it was benign, but I wasn't reassured. All this means is that I don't have cancer _for now._ It could surface any time. My body, my ability to have children, and my life could be threatened not just by those dividing cells, but by being unable to afford the treatments that can stop them.
That biopsy was a reality check for me--and it's motivated me to take action to make sure Jessica Morse is our next Congresswoman. I'm fighting for Jessica because she's fighting for me and over 300,000 residents of our district who live with pre-existing conditions and live in fear of losing coverage if Tom McClintock and his allies get their way.
[_**Lives like mine depend on Jessica being elected this November. There are less than 12 weeks to go --please chip in to help her team reach every single voter they can.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSpD08sO-tSfEYoNqyPSnE1hoMp28zCMDiEWRySMoCM=/egbsJ5s4m9wwTUATrX5Ffqr1WXjROfSkqeYealW5RoI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180815_RC_preex_all_l1)
Thank you,
Rachel Croopnick
Rocklin, CA
[CONTRIBUTE ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSpD08sO-tSfEYoNqyPSnE1hoMp28zCMDiEWRySMoCM=/egbsJ5s4m9wwTUATrX5Ffqr1WXjROfSkqeYealW5RoI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180815_RC_preex_contribbutton)
---

P.S. I want to make sure as many people as possible hear this story--once you've chipped in, can you **[share this video on Facebook to help inform voters about the stakes in this race?](https://act.myngp.com/el/OSpD08sO-tSfEYoNqyPSnE1hoMp28zCMDiEWRySMoCM=/7eJJeE42E0co11RUTWHTaIcEdY41-DFBberDXw-Tyx4=)**

Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign.

name: M. Kelly
subject: there's no doubt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |

---
I need your help, friend.
Our mid-month deadline is right around the corner. **But time's running out to hit our critical $10,000 goal, and right now, we're falling way short.**
The stakes are higher than ever. There's no doubt that President Trump's Supreme Court nominee could attack women's rights and overturn Roe v. Wade - and we know we can't count on Governor Chris Sununu to stand up for New Hampshire women. That's why I'm running for governor to protect women's rights and access to reproductive health care.
**If we're going to ****defeat Chris Sununu and ****defend women in our state against Trump's anti-women agenda, I need grassroots donors like you to give every dollar you can, right now:**
[**Please, friend****,**** will you give $5 or more - whatever you can spare before tonight's deadline - to help me win in November so I can fight for women's rights as governor of New Hampshire?**](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4904/d0ce7de/510b0301/9cd4ec6/1964767621/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrOTctZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk97-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you,

Molly

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Taking back Congress goes through here:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We can beat Dino Rossi and take back the House -- together.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78798/2f5ea88d/76808617/2cbc2ec3/534139367/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/insleefordrkimschrier?utm_source=ema_2018-08-15_inslee-for-schrier&refcode=ema_2018-08-15_inslee-for-schrier&utm_campaign=inslee-for-schrier&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Let me be perfectly clear: For Democrats to flip the House in 2018, we must win in Washington's 8th district. Period. And here's the bad news: The extreme right-wing Republican candidate, Dino Rossi, has run for office so many times, he has almost universal name recognition in the district. On the other hand, here's the good news: Republican candidate Dino Rossi has run for office and lost time after time -- we know exactly how to beat him. [**But with over $1.7 million in the bank thanks to his billionaire friends and Donald Trump, Dino Rossi is going to throw everything but the kitchen sink at winning this race. And, right now Democrats are playing catch-up. We need your urgent support to help Dr. Kim Schrier win this seat. Can you chip in $5 today?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78798/2f5ea88d/76808617/2cbc2ec3/534139367/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/insleefordrkimschrier?utm_source=ema_2018-08-15_inslee-for-schrier&refcode=ema_2018-08-15_inslee-for-schrier&utm_campaign=inslee-for-schrier&utm_medium=ema") Luckily for us, our Democratic nominee, Dr. Kim Schrier, is up to the fight. Kim joined the fight to take back Congress after Republicans voted to repeal President Obama's Affordable Care Act. In fact, she'd be the only female doctor in Congress if elected -- a voice we need now more than ever. Dino Rossi, on the other hand, is a Trump clone -- an out-of-touch millionaire who refuses to release his tax returns. A proud Trump delegate at the 2016 National Republican Convention, he's an extreme Republican who supports Trump's tax scheme and plans to pass deep cuts to Social Security and Medicare. He's far too extreme for this district. But the Cook Political Report says this race is a "toss-up," and Republican dark money groups are taking notice. In fact, Paul Ryan's super PAC has reserved over $2 million in television ads here. Even Donald Trump has sent him a check. This is a top target. We must win this race. And together, we can win. But to get to victory, Kim needs your urgent help! Chip in to support her race today: [**> > ActBlue.com/donate/InsleeforDrKimSchrier <<**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78798/2f5ea88d/76808617/2cbc2ec3/534139367/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/insleefordrkimschrier?utm_source=ema_2018-08-15_inslee-for-schrier&refcode=ema_2018-08-15_inslee-for-schrier&utm_campaign=inslee-for-schrier&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78798/2f5ea88d/76808617/2cbc2ec3/534139367/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/insleefordrkimschrier?utm_source=ema_2018-08-15_inslee-for-schrier&refcode=ema_2018-08-15_inslee-for-schrier&utm_campaign=inslee-for-schrier&utm_medium=ema")

clean_body: We can beat Dino Rossi and take back the House -- together. | "" Friend, Let me be perfectly clear: For Democrats to flip the House in 2018, we must win in Washington's 8th district. Period. And here's the bad news: The extreme right-wing Republican candidate, Dino Rossi, has run for office so many times, he has almost universal name recognition in the district. On the other hand, here's the good news: Republican candidate Dino Rossi has run for office and lost time after time -- we know exactly how to beat him. "" Luckily for us, our Democratic nominee, Dr. Kim Schrier, is up to the fight. Kim joined the fight to take back Congress after Republicans voted to repeal President Obama's Affordable Care Act. In fact, she'd be the only female doctor in Congress if elected -- a voice we need now more than ever. Dino Rossi, on the other hand, is a Trump clone -- an out-of-touch millionaire who refuses to release his tax returns. A proud Trump delegate at the 2016 National Republican Convention, he's an extreme Republican who supports Trump's tax scheme and plans to pass deep cuts to Social Security and Medicare. He's far too extreme for this district. But the Cook Political Report says this race is a "toss-up," and Republican dark money groups are taking notice. In fact, Paul Ryan's super PAC has reserved over $2 million in television ads here. Even Donald Trump has sent him a check. This is a top target. We must win this race. And together, we can win. But to get to victory, Kim needs your urgent help! Chip in to support her race today: "" Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | ""

|

| | | _Everything_ in Martin's Senate race changed with Gary Johnson's candidacy, team. That's why we're rushing to raise rapid response funds so we can take on Johnson's national network of Libertarian backers.

**[Contribute $29 now and help us close our budget gap before midnight -- we only have $14,945 to go!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+ask+now+and+help+us+close+our&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_2_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_2_4")**

_Begin original message by Brad Elkins:_

Our race got flipped on its head yesterday.

**Gary Johnson is officially challenging Martin for his Senate seat, and now Martin will be facing Johnson's national network of Libertarian backers.**

Read more below on what this means for our race and Democrats nationwide, or **[if you want to help us fight back immediately, contribute here->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+if+you+want+to+help+us+fight+back+immedi&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_2_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_2_4")**

* * *

Yesterday, Gary Johnson entered the race against Martin, and **this could spell bad news for our campaign.**

Johnson is a former Libertarian presidential candidate with backers who could pour millions into his campaign against Martin. Plus, he already has his own super PAC ready to go all in to help his last-minute bid.

This is the _last thing_ Democrats need as we fight to defend Martin's seat and take back the Senate majority this November.
**[HELP MARTIN FIGHT BACK>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+HELP+MARTIN+FIGHT+BACK+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_2_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180815_2_4")** Gary Johnson's policies are too extreme for the Senate. He wants to gut Medicare and Medicaid, repeal the ACA, raise the retirement age and get rid of the minimum wage.

**_[Yesterday Martin announced we needed to raise another $45,000 in rapid response funding to fight back against this latest news. Right now we're a little over halfway there. Please, can you help us close our new budget gap before midnight so we can take on Gary Johnson?](http://nm.martinheinrich. Read more below on what this means for our race and Democrats nationwide, or "" Yesterday, Gary Johnson entered the race against Martin, and this could spell bad news for our campaign. Plus, he already has his own super PAC ready to go all in to help his last-minute bid. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Miss Gert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa955/34a064cc/d2cd7d6/70efcf4/1712453196/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends - As students across Georgia go back to school, I wanted to tell you why support for public education is a cornerstone of our campaign: My mother was an elementary school dropout who went on to become her high school's valedictorian. Her path was not easy - but access to public education, a neighbor named Miss Gert, and a teacher who believed in her potential transformed my mom's life.
_My mom, Carolyn Abrams_ You see, my mom, Carolyn, grew up in abject poverty in the Deep South during the era of Jim Crow. None of her siblings would finish high school. And at only eight years old, because of her circumstances, because of what she saw around her every day, my mom accepted the fact that she probably wasn't going to finish school either. Miss Gert, who lived nearby, wanted to know why my mom wasn't in class. Like most kids, Mom gave her best excuses, but Miss Gert didn't buy them. Instead, she told my mother, "Carolyn, you need to go back to school. You are too smart to stop now." Poverty, a broken home and too many missing days seemed insurmountable obstacles for her future. But Miss Gert hired my mom to do odd jobs, and she also provided stability and guidance. And she kept on my mom, even as a new school year rolled around. Miss Gert pushed Mom to accept her potential - _to not give up on her future_. So my mom screwed up her courage and went back to school. Nervous and embarrassed, she walked into the principal's office, certain that she'd be held back a grade. At that moment, my mom lived the values she taught my five siblings and me: **Never let your fears, your doubts, or your circumstances shape your sense of self-worth and stifle your ability.** Standing in the principal's office, instead of being chastised or demoted, the principal opened a folder with my mother's name on it. That folder contained a note from her last teacher, reading: "If Carolyn ever comes back to this school, pass her on to the next grade. She's smart enough." Because of Miss Gert and a teacher who believed in her potential, my mother not only returned to school - she graduated as her high school's valedictorian - though she faced additional struggles along the way. She attended Tougaloo College, earned a Master's degree in Library Science from the University of Wisconsin, and a Master of Divinity degree from Emory University - with honors in each program. My father, Rev. Robert Abrams, the first man in his family to go to college, graduated from Emory University with Rev. Carolyn Abrams by his side.
_My family (Jeanine, me, Dad, Walter, Andrea, Richard, Mom, Leslie)_ Like that teacher, Miss Gert saw my mother's capacity to succeed and helped her push through the harsh realities that could have stopped her. Our state needs more "Miss Gerts" - people who know that "what is" does not have to limit what will be. Who understand that our beginnings do not have to dictate who we will become. Who will stand up and fight until all children believe their futures can be limitless. **We need you to speak up in this election - to be the ones who expect more from the leaders who serve our state - and more from yourselves, to be the ones to see ****real****possibility.**
_My parents drove all night from Mississippi to stand with me as I qualified to be on the statewide primary ballot (AJC.com)._ As Georgia's next governor, I will fight every day for children like my mom, in communities where graduating from high school and pursuing a career is the exception, not the rule. [**Check out my comprehensive plans to support K-12 public schools and invest in Georgia's children from cradle to career.**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa955/34a064cc/d2cd7d6/70efcf5/1712453196/VEsE/ "https://staceyabrams.com/vision/children/") With a governor who believes in all of us - who prioritizes investments in public education, in health care, and in job creation across all 159 counties - the opportunities for our children and our state will be limitless. Thank you, as always, for standing with me. \- Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa955/34a064cc/d2cd7d6/70efcf2/1712453196/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODE1MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE081518-full")**

subject: Fighting Back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK |
body:
Dear Friend,

Smears and distortions.

The special interests are just going to keep coming for me. And the airwaves will keep getting flooded with nasty ads smearing my record — with the latest attack coming from the D.C.-based Republican Governors Association, yet another group funded by the Kochs.

Why?

Laxalt’s Republican allies in Washington know that if I’m elected, I won’t serve their special interests. That’s why they’re spending millions to put misleading information on TV.

But you can help me fight back today, team. Chip in $5 now to help us raise $2,092 more to meet our mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tonight.

» https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sisolak-aug-midmonth

We need your help to combat these disgusting ads.

We can’t let the special interests from out of state be the only ones getting their message out this fall. If we have the resources we need, we can get our message out to the voters who are ready to keep Nevada moving forward — no matter what these outside groups do or say.

Please help us stay on track by chipping in before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sisolak-aug-midmonth

Thank you,

Steve

Friend, we're starting the general with some BIG news!

President Donald Trump endorsed my campaign for Senate and, friend, I could not be more proud.

Friend, the Washington establishment thinks they can silence us. They think if they spend enough money in Wisconsin, Tammy Baldwin will win, and they can continue forcing their radical agenda on Wisconsin.

They think our campaign is a lost cause!

But let me tell you, I’ve heard that a few times before:
1. Most recently, they said President Trump had no chance at turning Wisconsin red.
2. When I ran for state Senate, the elites in Madison told me, point blank, “you will never get anything done if you vote with the conservative wing in the party.”

Friend, they were wrong then. And they’re wrong now!

President Trump won bigger in Wisconsin than any Republican since Reagan, and I worked with Governor Walker to usher in an era of conservative change in Wisconsin – WITHOUT compromising any of my values.

I know there’s NOTHING we cannot do if we work hard and, friend, I can’t wait to prove the naysayers wrong once again.

With President Trump and the Wisconsin grassroots by my side, I am more confident than ever that we will defeat Tammy Baldwin and help President Trump put an END to Washington dysfunction!

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d5ed28fdacc5456580b7723eb5aaa35c&_e=AZ8P2Me5llqcJvGW6Ge8xcL_DwDcFYzLQiqA7K2gX1p6w0JuDv7DqZVvhdUDG2gUp4unHd76gkKGzbr-m0HwOMxNGRgNdlNvbV2KFLo0KboQd0DwSwiSu0kdUakRBSgnzeKcaWwOdJPWmRIyPcazoojR2d1GMZauC2DTBWcfbIbVdPQ6UegjLCHYEObCYTosMwNV8DF6yTHJEVXNSjtTuOeccxNysCx40X_JKKcwVS_KAnIeiMBIESIf8VEwNrMcsgBvHs-dSxCRSorQ4P7ZwY81LndrZ2CnXAc1WzZgMlavnFsNL7voaX2SppyBuFU3AXf8ZOI0UBqqW047NPdt0AQ2T02yM6TYr0z6qtzx8Q-1FviveEML8vWu4vFqJxWk) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d5ed28fdacc5456580b7723eb5aaa35c&_e=AZ8P2Me5llqcJvGW6Ge8xcL_DwDcFYzLQiqA7K2gX1oEdiKznjZf9LZm_I62CAaC8C_LCV2OYaUt9rPg-SKQUh2yhS4CWR5MPcgDkFwzLWGevQXjwtGiuEsAEN7IuHWzOI22BcvwNY7lN5_ltg3ZQHSzgwom_hygfOYcF48XuI8E5J0Z9ep_dAY8Uy_VGGbd-qApNMozgRo7P8OiAbGmriGkS4d6Q_OO64KsHsAKc-S-d34ExrDUSUr46QGcNNxOJlFbGXPF6lPyEc4cMk0QuEgXJuYS1vpvS6S1t9WMhiqhNON3sLdcka0XLE3ZucOp35y4djImh7HuH7OkKk_-sdFCa0wdkFcmCkXTv6XCabCE_jeJn-pSW8S-ys0YgVbs) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d5ed28fdacc5456580b7723eb5aaa35c&_e=AZ8P2Me5llqcJvGW6Ge8xS8YpvgGfuKvkwUxCvuyVP4tCoERJaT-JuYXq5hWIZCgJka7flJtbrX0PAImW6qhnTr7ylDNiKdxV-FAiMvwP8idxitxgy9BU14jvC3EzlRpZUSjq4eL0FshBg5hf8UKt3mFuc2OnxFRPnMRadJTw7A9_6knrG_CjwJazFFwqIGB6cjVmmnFjCTv8u7LiCjxkE4X9A2c5ZGnIEPQ2QhE74FfUIRAUD-mNCKMNY7ECS9VddGUed4QI-siIUR79jhlwA%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d5ed28fdacc5456580b7723eb5aaa35c&_e=AZ8P2Me5llqcJvGW6Ge8xdHJhP03pi2EtrwMeul9MLrnfObFA2JCueKrrKgv0poeYvmveXfn9X7VTMVIZ2_lh0MMzennsPj7FKHrC2rB123hPmCwTcKN-gdn3Z3hzWgyhWKn9skHMp1SKKlE47UO61fZK6sDywx1LW0ELnCy3MtsTAyt-5uIyKNUeMRxYQpHbMJBqhN0kHaJSRDNjGu7YVFDxya4l09zKclw7zdm-3lNxDY1eVfonR4LYJNQuNktphuaUShrmTHktFO5OOX-4g%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d5ed28fdacc5456580b7723eb5aaa35c&_e=AZ8P2Me5llqcJvGW6Ge8xYtqvnk7wYT-sLRI4XZsfsEv-vJy04whNbcQwq-BhJYK9B2ok4WfrTg3TdOsgCAJY9iu2klhzAosYaqqbmprwZeGkWrtwZYaYLvyDtdaLpDnOFGME4-lWz4ApW3Jb7KoL5qoVIp6bZcN9KCtZx3sXf63msrLESBa5nkP11OVKFjFKyZy8B4QTCEiOGReUK1TfyFAkMTpOBOfqJwEUs1raNAcO1gzTGJHMLqkdd4DPDa9D6fIvPsWFkdrBftpEQv5bQ%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d5ed28fdacc5456580b7723eb5aaa35c&_e=hEYsL3rGM3700omL1tyaXF6ZK0hV6tBzL2C1iiY0ZiDmVA1AYWGXxt_gH47XtO9nq_k7d-Tbuur08EgmpzM5HrtO7gSXGjm2yRQsrWElfahTrXqGMimxVOAsZDVgt1vIIDjKyo44kOf_KqAyp0hbgZ7jLH8AKMyrRxSfZ3Z41RkAZjleQxhuwBFJWnx3h3za6e_wwqpr69hSO8ezeyBc_ZULJJigxjWrQhTXfu7s5xCBBCJ-us46qcc3NPfJKj78) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d5ed28fdacc5456580b7723eb5aaa35c&_e=hEYsL3rGM3700omL1tyaXF6ZK0hV6tBzL2C1iiY0ZiDmVA1AYWGXxt_gH47XtO9nq_k7d-Tbuur08EgmpzM5HrtO7gSXGjm2yRQsrWElfahTrXqGMimxVOAsZDVgt1vIIDjKyo44kOf_KqAyp0hbgZ7jLH8AKMyrRxSfZ3Z41RkAZjleQxhuwBFJWnx3h3za6e_wwqpr69hSO8ezeyBc_ZULJJigxjWrQhTXfu7s5xCBBCJ-us46qcc3NPfJKj78) to unsubscribe. clean_body: President Trump offered us a chance to DRAIN THE SWAMP, and we took it! Now, we have another chance to stand with President Trump to drain the swamp.. Friend, we're starting the general with some BIG news! President Donald Trump endorsed my campaign for Senate and, friend, I could not be more proud. Friend, this is huge for us. If you remember right, President Trump won Wisconsin big in 2016. And I know why! Here in Wisconsin, we’re real, hard-working Americans who are fed up with status quo politics. President Trump offered us a chance to DRAIN THE SWAMP, and we took it! Now, we have another chance to stand with President Trump to drain the swamp and defeat Tammy Baldwin in November. But friend, I won’t be able to do it without you. Liberals in Washington are going to do everything they can to make sure WE LOSE so Tammy Baldwin can continue her obstructionist ways in the Senate. Today, I need you to join President Trump and chip in to help us defeat Baldwin! Friend, the Washington establishment thinks they can silence us. They think if they spend enough money in Wisconsin, Tammy Baldwin will win, and they can continue forcing their radical agenda on Wisconsin. They think our campaign is a lost cause! But let me tell you, I’ve heard that a few times before: 1. Most recently, they said President Trump had no chance at turning Wisconsin red. 2. When I ran for state Senate, the elites in Madison told me, point blank, “you will never get anything done if you vote with the conservative wing in the party.” Friend, they were wrong then. And they’re wrong now! President Trump won bigger in Wisconsin than any Republican since Reagan, and I worked with Governor Walker to usher in an era of conservative change in Wisconsin – WITHOUT compromising any of my values. I know there’s NOTHING we cannot do if we work hard and, friend, I can’t wait to prove the naysayers wrong once again. With President Trump and the Wisconsin grassroots by my side, I am more confident than ever that we will defeat Tammy Baldwin and help President Trump put an END to Washington dysfunction! Together, we'll bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington and help President Trump put America First. Thank you, friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e63ae/51dbcc2a/1f487690/3a94774/4174126732/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team -- things are getting serious here in PA.

The top of the Republican establishment has shown that they are invested in Pennsylvania this year. In the past month, both President Trump and VP Pence have made appearances on behalf of Bob's opponent, raising an estimated _one million dollars_ in the process.

**_[We need to raise another $7,200 _today_ in order to compete with that, or we don't stand a chance. Can you give $5 or more to protect Bob Casey?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180815_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Because we'll be electing representatives for new, fairer congressional districts, Democrats have an opportunity to win big in PA this year. _One-quarter_ of the seats needed to win back the House majority are right here in the Commonwealth, so the importance of this election cannot be underestimated.

In order to achieve a Democratic majority in Congress, voters need to protect every single Democrat that is up for re-election, starting with Bob at the top of the ticket. The GOP is already targeting vulnerable Democrats just like Bob this year in order to strengthen their slim majority, and that will only get worse as it gets closer to Election Day.

**This administration has its sights set on PA this year, so there's no time to waste.
